commit.message:
MENUREGISTRY-FILEBAR-A1: registry-drive the File menu bar (behaviour-identical)

Option A / step A1 from the wire-vs-ratify design report (human-chosen). Swap
the File menu bar's item PRODUCTION from the hardcoded file_menu_items() array
to the data-driven MenuRegistry, leaving rendering + the FIFO handoff + the
shell routing byte-for-byte unchanged. editor-egui-host only; single file; 0
Cargo.toml (it already deps rge-editor-ui).

crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs:
- New const FILE_MENU_EXTENSION_POINT = "editor.main_menu.file" + private fn
  build_file_menu_entries(): builds a MenuRegistry, declares the File point,
  registers three MenuEntry (file.open/"Open…", file.save/"Save",
  file.save_as/"Save As New Project…"), resolves once against an empty
  PredicateContext, and projects entries_for(file) to the (label, Command)
  pairs the bar paints. The entries carry the default OrderHint::AtEnd in the
  default section, so resolve returns them in registration order with
  byte-identical labels => the rendered menu is behaviour-identical.
- Removed file_menu_items() (its content is now the registration source).
- EguiHost gains a cached `file_menu_entries: Vec<(String, Command)>`, populated
  once in EguiHost::new (resolve-once; per-frame re-resolve deferred to A2).
- render(): the File menu bar iterates the cached entries (borrowed as a
  disjoint field before the run_ui closure to avoid capturing all of self)
  instead of file_menu_items(); the egui structure
  (Panel::top -> MenuBar::new().ui -> menu_button("File")), ui.button(label) ->
  push(Command) -> ui.close() are unchanged.
- menu_tests retargeted onto build_file_menu_entries(): (1) it resolves to
  exactly [("Open…",OpenFile),("Save",Save),("Save As New Project…",SaveAs)] in
  order; (2) those Commands round-trip FIFO through a MenuCommandHandoff.

Pins honored: EditorKeyCommand::from_key_press stays the live keyboard decoder
(untouched); NO shortcuts registered (AcceleratorTable stays empty/unused — no
accelerator execution); File menu only; FIFO handoff + shell routing
(drain_and_route_menu_commands) unchanged; no Edit/View/Play, plugin entries, or
registry-wide redesign; no A2-A4.

Known out-of-scope doc drift (deliberately deferred to a follow-up reconcile,
per the human-pinned single-file scope): plans/BASELINE.md (563/574/593/648),
Status.md, HANDOFF.md, change.md still frame the File bar as "a direct host menu
bar over a hardcoded file_menu_items() list" with "MenuRegistry::resolve
deferred." A separate doc-reconcile dispatch should reword these (the File
menu's items are now MenuRegistry::resolve-produced and the registry IS
instantiated at EguiHost::new; what remains deferred is registry-driven command
EXECUTION (still FIFO-routed), accelerator-table execution, Edit/View/Play
menus, and plugin entries).

Gate: VERIFY OK (7/7) + 10/10 arch lints. cargo check --all-targets clean (no
new warnings); nightly fmt clean; diff single-file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
